_comment: proxymock/mock fixture for the AI locale-drift demo. Serve as the LLM provider response (point OPENAI_URL at the mock). The assistant 'drifted' to Japanese; with an en-US request (cp1252) ai-service 500s on the downstream encode. Swap content to ASCII to show the clean path.

message.content: 申し訳ありませんが、お客様の残高は $1,234.56 です。ご不明な点がございましたらお知らせください。
